questionHtml: Describe the correlation between T and G with reference to the value of r, the Pearson’s product-moment correlation coefficient.
markschemeHtml:
r= 0.994 =0.993910…                    A1

there is a (very) strong positive linear correlation                    R1

Note: If r is missing award A0R0.

[2 marks]
